sourcesContent:
// src/data/doctors.js

export const doctors = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Dr. Suman Rai",
    specialty: "Internal Medicine",
    hospitalId: 1, // links to Dharan Health Clinic
    experience: "10 years",
    qualification: "MBBS, MD Internal Medicine",
    availability: "Mon-Sat: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM",
    bio: "Experienced in managing diabetes, hypertension, and respiratory conditions. Focus on preventive care.",
    image: "/images/doctors/suman-rai.jpg", // ← path we'll explain below
  },
  {
    id: 102,
    name: "Dr. Maya Thapa",
    specialty: "Physiotherapy",
    hospitalId: 1,
    experience: "7 years",
    qualification: "BPT, MPT Orthopedics",
    availability: "Tue-Fri: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM",
    bio: "Specialized in post-surgical rehab, sports injuries, and chronic pain management.",
    image: "/images/doctors/maya-thapa.jpg",
  },
  {
    id: 201,
    name: "Dr. Anita Sharma",
    specialty: "Gynecology",
    hospitalId: 2,
    experience: "12 years",
    qualification: "MBBS, MS Obstetrics & Gynecology",
    availability: "Mon-Fri: 8:00 AM - 3:00 PM",
    bio: "Expert in high-risk pregnancies, laparoscopic surgeries, and fertility treatments.",
    image: "/images/doctors/anita-sharma.jpg",
  },
  // Add more doctors here...
  // Make sure each has unique id and correct hospitalId
];
